parameters.query: query GetTemplateItem($id: ID!) { card(id: $id) { id title current_phase { id name } fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } }

query FindFin04ByTemplate($pipeId: ID!, $fieldId: String!, $templateId: String!, $first: Int!) { findCards(pipeId: $pipeId, first: $first, search: { fieldId: $fieldId, fieldValue: $templateId }) { edges { node { id fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
